title: Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Joint Balloting)
text:
Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Joint Balloting) - SupportGoWhere
Family Care Scheme (FCS) (Joint Balloting)
Share link
Helps parents and their child(ren), married or single, to jointly apply for 2 units in the same Build-To-Order (BTO) project.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Parents and their child(ren), married or single, can make a joint application for 2 units in a BTO project that offers 2-room Flexi or 3-room flats.
Collapse all sections
About this support

Seeks to support families to live closer together in the same BTO project.

Parents and their child(ren), married or single, can make a joint application for 2 units in a BTO project that offers 2-room Flexi or 3-room flats.

Successful parent-child pairs will each receive a distinct queue position within the respective flat supplies.

HDB will schedule flat booking appointments based on the respective queue positions, which may take place separately.

Who is this for?

Parents

Married couples (applicable to fiancé/ fiancée applicants)

Singles above 35

How to apply?

Obtain an HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your flat application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
